content.json:
# Azure OpenAI Latency Router Dashboard

This workbook shows routing decisions, TTFT measurements, backend health, and probe results from the latency-aware APIM router.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "backend="
| parse message with "backend=" backend " ttft=" ttft_str "ms newEma=" ema_str
| extend ttft = todouble(ttft_str), ema = todouble(ema_str)
| summarize p50_ttft=percentile(ttft, 50), p95_ttft=percentile(ttft, 95), avg_ttft=avg(ttft), request_count=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), backend
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: TTFT by Region (p50 / p95)

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "backend="
| parse message with "backend=" backend " ttft=" * "ms" *
| summarize count() by backend
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Routing Distribution

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "backend="
| parse message with "backend=" backend " ttft=" ttft_str "ms" *
| extend ttft = todouble(ttft_str)
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), backend
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Routing Distribution Over Time

content.query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "ProbeResult"
| extend region = tostring(customDimensions.region), success = tostring(customDimensions.success)
| summarize avg_ttft=avg(value), p95_ttft=percentile(value, 95), probe_count=count(), failures=countif(success == "false") by bin(timestamp, 15m), region
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Probe Results

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where message startswith "backend="
| parse message with "backend=" backend " ttft=" ttft_str "ms newEma=" ema_str
| extend ttft = todouble(ttft_str)
| summarize latest_ttft=arg_max(timestamp, ttft), avg_ttft=avg(ttft), p95_ttft=percentile(ttft, 95), request_count=count() by backend
| extend status = iff(p95_ttft > 8000, "DEGRADED", "HEALTHY")
| project backend, status, ['Latest TTFT (ms)']=round(latest_ttft1, 0), ['Avg TTFT (ms)']=round(avg_ttft, 0), ['p95 TTFT (ms)']=round(p95_ttft, 0), ['Requests']=request_count
| order by backend asc
content.title: Current Backend Health
